notes: Born March 30, 1766 in Poughkeepsie, NY. Baptized May 4, 1766. Dutch heritage — DuBois family prominent in Hudson Valley. Father Louis (Lewis) DuBois (1744-1824, Poughkeepsie). Mother Allida Van Kleek (1742-1793, Poughkeepsie — Van Kleek is a prominent Dutch Hudson Valley family). Siblings: Catherine (1768-1772), Johannes (1769-1842), Catherine (1775), Susanna (1775), Simon (1775), James (1778). First marriage: Jacomyntje Van Benschoten on May 10, 1787 in Poughkeepsie (she died 1787). Second marriage: Hannah Hoff (1770-1842) in 1788. Children with Hannah: Rachel (1791), Lewis (1793), Laurence (1794-1873), Jacob (1796-1850), Nathaniel (1798-1844), Elizabeth (1806). Lived his entire life in Poughkeepsie — census records from 1790 through 1840. Father Louis died March 4, 1824. Mother Allida died 1793. Wife Hannah and brother Johannes both died on June 23, 1842 — the same day Elias himself died. Three deaths on the same day. Died June 23, 1842 at age 76. Buried in Poughkeepsie.
